repo.name: bobquest-demo
repo.summary: Small repository used to validate the BobQuest backend runtime path without spending IBM Bob Shell credits.

flows.title: Repository health check flow
flows.summary: A developer inspects the repository, runs the validation command, and confirms that the expected source files are present.
flows.why_it_matters: This is the safest first path because it teaches the repository entry point without requiring code changes.

steps.title: Inspect repository entry point
steps.summary: Start by reading the README and the package manifest to understand how the project is launched.

files.reason: The README explains the project purpose and first command.
The manifest lists the validation scripts a new developer should run.

tests.reason: The accumulated test command confirms the repository still satisfies the onboarding contract.

steps.bob_explanation: IBM Bob identifies this flow as a starter-safe path because it is read-oriented and validates understanding before any mutation.

evidence.reason: The entry-point documentation anchors the first onboarding step.

starter_missions.title: Confirm the validation command
starter_missions.why_enabled: The mission only asks the developer to identify the safe validation command before touching the codebase.

files_to_understand.reason: The command is declared in the scripts section.

validation_commands.reason: This command should remain the accumulated local validation entry point.

interaction.prompt: Which command should a new developer run before changing this repository?
interaction.success_message: Correct. Start with the accumulated validation command.
interaction.failure_message: Not yet. Choose the safe validation command rather than a destructive operation.

starter_missions.title: Explain the runtime path
starter_missions.why_enabled: The developer can describe the runtime path without modifying files.

files_to_understand.reason: The README provides the runtime entry point.

validation_commands.reason: The command verifies the explanation against the repository contract.

interaction.prompt: Explain how the repository health check flow proves the backend runtime is wired correctly.
interaction.evaluation_guidance: Accept answers that mention repository cloning, Bob Shell execution, JSON validation, and run_state persistence.

locked_or_later_issues.title: Change deployment topology
locked_or_later_issues.reason: Deployment topology changes are not suitable as a first issue because they can break runtime availability.
